name: pixel-lens
description: Lightweight pixel color picker utility for Windows and macOS

scripts.install:mac: rm -rf /Applications/PixelLens.app && cp -R src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/PixelLens.app /Applications/PixelLens.app && codesign --deep --force --options runtime --entitlements src-tauri/entitlements.plist -s 'Apple Development: suzupc@opal.famille.ne.jp (9YPX4L9Z8U)' /Applications/PixelLens.app
